description_long: This sculpture depicts an adult male figure holding a child in his arms, both rendered in a classical, realistic style. The adult, with a bearded face and draped robes, gazes affectionately at the child, who is perched on his left arm and appears to be reaching up to touch the man's face. The figures stand on a square plinth base, which provides stability and elevates the composition. The drapery of the robes is intricately carved, with deep folds and a sense of weight and movement. The sculpture is monochromatic, with a weathered, light stone appearance, suggesting it is made from marble or a similar material. The overall impression is one of tenderness and protection, with the figures closely interacting.
description: A realistic stone sculpture of a bearded man holding a child, both dressed in flowing robes and standing on a square plinth. The figures are intricately detailed, conveying a sense of warmth and protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the adult male's face, the child's gesture toward his face, and the detailed drapery of their robes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of both figures, the child's position on the man's arm, and the depth of the robe's folds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, flowing back of the adult's robe and the back of the child's head, with less detail on facial features.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the adult's back and the way the robe wraps around his body, with the child partially visible.
attribute_subject_matter: adult male figure holding a child
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
